ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager for the mission */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., planned, in-progress, completed, archived) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the mission */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the mission */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the mission */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., planetary exploration, satellite deployment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the spacecraft is part of */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the spacecraft */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the spacecraft (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_type" TEXT /* Type of spacecraft (e.g., rover, orbiter, lander) */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the spacecraft in kilograms */,
  "power_source" TEXT /* Type of power source (e.g., solar, nuclear) */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Method of communication (e.g., radio, laser) */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last successful communication with the spacecraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spacecraft_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_objects" (
  "data_object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data object */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spacecraft the data object is associated with */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the data object */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the data object (e.g., MSB_UNSIGNED_INT, EGER) */,
  "row_bytes" INTEGER /* Number of bytes per row in the data object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data object */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data object */,
  "file_pointer" TEXT /* Pointer to the file containing the record format description */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data object was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., sensor, camera) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  "data_usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the data object has been accessed or used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_objects_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_objects_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecraft ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_objects_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data object the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "encryption_status" TEXT /* Status of file encryption (e.g., encrypted, unencrypted) */,
  "compression_status" TEXT /* Status of file compression (e.g., compressed, uncompressed) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_object_id") REFERENCES data_objects ("data_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record format */,
  "data_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data object the format belongs to */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the record format */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the record format description */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the format was uploaded */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the record format */,
  "format_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the format (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  "format_usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the format has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_formats_data_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_object_id") REFERENCES data_objects ("data_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., MSB_UNSIGNED_INT, EGER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_type_group" TEXT /* Group of data types (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "data_type_format" TEXT /* Format of the data type (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., MIPL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., ground station, spacecraft) */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location of the source (e.g., Earth, Mars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project manager belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the project manager's office */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., aerospace engineering, data science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the access was made (e.g., IP address, physical location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_object_id") REFERENCES data_objects ("data_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data object the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data object */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_object_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_object_versions_data_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_object_id") REFERENCES data_objects ("data_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_object_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent data object */,
  "child_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child data object */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, related) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_object_relationships_parent_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_object_id") REFERENCES data_objects ("data_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_object_relationships_child_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_object_id") REFERENCES data_objects ("data_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_object_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data object the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_object_comments_data_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_object_id") REFERENCES data_objects ("data_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_object_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_object_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data object the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., category, keyword) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_object_tags_data_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_object_id") REFERENCES data_objects ("data_object_id")
)
